short_summary: US-Iran peace deal confirmed, markets react
rationale: The confirmed US-Iran ceasefire announcement with Strait of Hormuz reopening is a qualitative step — stock markets soaring and oil falling are direct impacts on US residents' finances and daily costs; deal signing Friday is the next milestone.

top_events.title: US-Iran ceasefire announced; Hormuz reopening; stock markets soar, oil falls
top_events.summary: The confirmed ceasefire announcement is a qualitative upgrade from prior 'deal expected' state — US stock markets already rising and oil prices falling, directly benefiting American consumers and investors. Deal signing set for Friday.

top_events.title: Trump says Tren de Aragua gang leader killed in US strike
top_events.summary: Trump confirmed the killing of the Venezuelan gang leader — a continuation of established domestic security operations with limited new qualitative impact on daily American life.

top_events.title: China arrests US academic at conference for espionage
top_events.summary: Another US academic detained by China on espionage charges — continuation of an established pattern of US-China tensions with limited direct impact on most Americans' daily lives.
